mapper.update:
Update XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM Set
AssignmentType = #{assignmentType},
RoleType = #{roleType},
Assigned = #{assigned},
OrderNum = #{orderNum},
AccessRight = #{accessRight},
LastUpdated = GETDATE() Where Seq = #{seq}
mapper.insert: Insert Into XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM (MemberID, ItemID, AssignmentType, RoleType, OrderNum, Assigned, AccessRight, Creator, AssignedDate, LastUpdated) Values(#{memberID},#{itemID},#{assignmentType},#{roleType},#{orderNum},#{assigned},#{accessRight},#{creator},GETDATE(),GETDATE())
mapper.delete: Delete From XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE Where TeamRoleID IN(${teamRoleIDs})
mapper.select: SELECT TT.RoleManagerID , TM1.Name As RoleManagerNM , TT.RoleManagerID AS curRoleManagerID , ISNULL(TMT.Name,'') AS TeamNM FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TIC ON TI.ItemID = TIC.ToItemID AND TIC.CategoryCode = 'CN' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TTR ON TTR.ItemID = TIC.FromItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT ON TTR.TeamID = TT.TeamID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TTR.TeamID And TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM1 ON TM1.MemberID = TT.RoleManagerID WHERE TI.ItemID = #{s_itemID} AND TIC.ClassCode = #{cxnCode} AND TTR.TeamRoleID IS NOT NULL
